steps.title: Locate the median in the box plot
steps.content: In a box plot, the median is shown by the line inside the box. Examining the given box plot, that line is positioned between the lower and upper quartiles.

steps.title: Read the median value
steps.content:
The median line lines up with the tick mark marked 7,067 on the axis, so the median is approximately 7,067 acres.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
